name: ThePurge
description: All-in-one Discord moderation, automation, ticketing, engagement, and dashboard bot.
author: Code Copilot
highlights: Lazy-loaded Discord command modules with feature-level failure boundaries
Built-in Express dashboard and Discord OAuth login
Lazy-loaded dashboard route modules with per-module outage responses
Live dashboard feed using server-sent events
PostgreSQL-backed guild settings, modules, audit logs, scheduler, custom commands, ticketing, levels, and economy
Ticket panel, private ticket channel, claim, close, and transcript workflow
Scheduled purge command support and legacy interval migration
Shared media purge service with permission checks, pagination, and honest delete counts
Dashboard starts in degraded mode when bot, database, or required config is unavailable
Remote Ops can transmit dashboard microphone audio and browser-captured screen/app audio into Discord voice
Server-side Jellyfin API access for dashboard system, library, session, and activity visibility
Jellyfin movie catalogue access controls and Discord browse flow by genre, year, or actor
next: Add richer Jellyfin playback actions once direct-play handling is defined
Add browser-playable inbound Discord voice monitoring through a receiver/decoder layer
Add dashboard form support for reaction-role message binding
Expand ticket transcripts beyond the most recent 100 messages
Add integration tests with mocked Discord and PostgreSQL clients
